sections.title: Who We Are
sections.body: CHASEHORSE is a technology-driven logistics and supply chain transformation company delivering innovative solutions across industries globally. As a growth enabling partner, we orchestrated need-of-the-hour solutions engineered with futuristic capabilities. We pioneer a first-of-its-kind Logistics-as-a-Service (LaaS) Platform and beyond—offering a simplified, plug-and-play model equipped with pre-integrated, deployment-ready resources.

sections.title: Why ChaseHorse G.E.L.P?
sections.subtitle: Value Creation . Futuristic . Practical . One Transparent Platform
sections.body: The Growth Enabler Logiworkx Platform engineered a paradigm shift by delivering rapid business scalability coupled with immediately accessible plug & play resources. Backed by live market intelligence, flexible finance options, and highly feasible cost models.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Get in touch with ChaseHorse logistics experts in Bangalore, India.

sections.title: Contact us
sections.body: Contact us about anything related to our company or services. We typically respond within 1-2 business days.

sections.title: Need help?
items: What sets us apart? — Personalized solutions tailored to every customer.
How is your data secured? — Advanced encryption and security protocols.
What support do we offer? — Support through email and phone.

jobs.title: Our Job Opportunities
jobs.description: Join ChaseHorse — flexible gig-based logistics assignments across PAN India.

sections.title: On-Field Logiworkx Lead
sections.body: We are inviting motivated professionals to collaborate with us on flexible, gig-based logistics assignments designed to fit around your schedule. This opportunity is ideal for individuals who value independence and want to take control of their working hours while contributing to real-world logistics operations. Each task provides hands-on experience in supply chain coordination, last-mile delivery operations, vendor interaction, and on-ground problem-solving. Performance-based earning model — Chasehorse, PAN INDIA.

sections.title: Fleet & Driver Management
sections.subtitle: CHASEHORSE ASSET OPTIMIZATION
sections.body: Fleet & Driver Management focuses on ensuring the efficient use, rigorous maintenance, precision planning, and absolute operational readiness of vehicles and drivers across all transportation operations.

modules.title: Accessories Driver/Trucks
modules.body: Meticulously manages and monitors all vital vehicle-mounted equipment and auxiliary driver kits essential for secure, compliant road operations.

modules.title: Maintenance
modules.body: Governs vehicle lifecycle performance by transforming reactive repair cycles into an organized, proactive machine-readiness structure.

modules.title: Planning & Scheduling
modules.body: Coordinates structural fleet allocations, driving regulations, freight profiles, and time windows into highly efficient freight dispatch movements.

sections.title: Why Choose ChaseHorse Fleet & Driver Management?
items: Brings driver safety accessories and asset checklists into a single compliance overview.
Scales machine dependability via rules-based predictive maintenance schedules.
Maximizes fleet optimization margins by balancing hours-of-service rules with dynamic route maps.
Cuts down line-haul logistics bottlenecks through unified capacity scheduling panels.

testimonials.name: Rajesh Kumar
testimonials.quote: ChaseHorse GELP transformed our onboarding from weeks to 24 hours. The platform's plug-and-play model gave us immediate visibility across our fleet network.

faqs.question: What is ChaseHorse GELP?
faqs.answer: GELP — Growth Enabler Logiworkx Platform — is ChaseHorse's Logistics-as-a-Service platform. It delivers pre-integrated, deployment-ready resources with Tier 1 strategy in 24 hours and Tier 2 operations scale in 48 hours.

faqs.question: Who can benefit from ChaseHorse services?
faqs.answer: Enterprises, logistics companies, fleet operators, warehouses, and supply chain teams of any size. Our three-tier model scales from digital foundation to advanced enterprise technology.

faqs.question: How quickly can we get started?
faqs.answer: Tier 1 strategy deployment begins within 24 hours. Tier 2 operations scaling is achievable within 48 hours. We follow a transparent, agile onboarding process tailored to your requirements.

faqs.question: What services are included in Tier 1?
faqs.answer: Core Business Services: Digital Transformation, CH Deploy, 8D Customer Complaints, Merchandise & PPEs, and Returns Management — your digital logistics foundation.

faqs.question: Do you offer fleet and driver management?
faqs.answer: Yes. Fleet & Driver Management is part of Tier 2, covering accessories, maintenance, planning & scheduling, and operational readiness across your transportation network.

faqs.question: Is the platform cloud-based?
faqs.answer: ChaseHorse is built on a Cloudflare-first architecture with real-time tracking via Durable Objects, D1 database, and enterprise-grade security for global scale.

faqs.question: How is data secured?
faqs.answer: We use advanced encryption, JWT-based authentication, role-based access control, audit logging, and Cloudflare's global security infrastructure to protect your logistics data.

faqs.question: Can I integrate with existing ERP or CRM systems?
faqs.answer: Yes. Tier 3 includes IT & Advanced Technologies with integration capabilities for Salesforce, SAP, Odoo, Shopify, and more through our Integration Hub.
